rationale: Ten exact official MTA route rows establish source-local route identity, realized effective dates, and one unambiguous atomic treatment apiece. Current-routing language constrains treatment scope and does not create a routing treatment. Q12, Q63, and Q5 references are explicitly partitioned as rider or separate-route context and do not create route edges. Every navigation and timetable cell is explicitly accounted for as non-treatment context.
